subject: A coiled green viper rearing up with its mouth open, fangs bared mid-strike
description: A large green snake with prominent diamond-patterned scales coils tightly in the foreground, head reared back and mouth gaping wide to reveal long curved fangs and a pink interior. The viper's body twists in muscular loops, scales catching highlights along its back ridge. The background is a moody dark green-and-black wash, suggesting dense foliage or jungle gloom rather than a defined location. The pose reads as an ambush in the instant before the strike — head up, body coiled, eye locked on the viewer.
foreground: Coiled green viper mid-strike, mouth open, fangs visible
background: Dark, indistinct foliage or jungle shadow in deep greens and blacks
emotion: predatory aggression, hostile intent, the moment before a strike
